# Guarantee Stack Priority Queue

If the goal is “make it work,” do these in order.

## 1. Install quality gates

Do not publish videos that fail first-frame, hook, text, proof, CTA, or trust checks.

## 2. Force every video to have a primary metric

No raw-view-only decisions.

## 3. Run first-frame and hook tests first

These are the earliest gates.

## 4. Add controlled exposure

If organic reach is too low, use paid/owned/community/partner distribution to get enough data.

## 5. Use replication trio before scaling

A single viral video is not a format.

## 6. Build search insurance

Every batch needs evergreen search assets.

## 7. Platform-translate winners

Do not repost blindly. Translate the winning mechanism to each platform grammar.

## 8. Scale only mechanisms with confidence level C3+

Do not scale C1 anecdotes.
